texto: ...early medieval Ireland sounds like a somewhat crazed Wisconsin, in which every dairy farm is an armed camp at perpetual war with its neighbors, and every farmer claims he is a king.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a David Willis McCullough: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “...early medieval Ireland sounds like a somewhat crazed Wisconsin, in which every dairy farm is a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, history, ireland pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de ireland.
